perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic overlay featuring the Costco logo and a cartoon character, set against a blurred background of a warehouse store aisle. (2) A series of rapid cuts follow, each showing a different product on a warehouse shelf or in a refrigerated section. Products include Kleenex tissues, trays of raw beef, milk powder cans, boxes of OREO cookies, egg rolls, various snacks, bottled wine, beer, and beverages. (3) Hands are occasionally seen reaching for products, and shoppers are visible in the background of some shots, walking through the aisles with carts.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo background music plays continuously throughout the video. (2) A high-pitched, energetic male voice provides a rapid-fire narration, speaking in Mandarin. He identifies each product and its discounted price in sync with the visual cuts. (3) Subtle ambient noise of a busy warehouse environment, such as the hum of refrigerators and distant chatter, is present but largely masked by the music and narration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Introductory text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE Weekly Special Report 03/31~04/06'. (2) Throughout the video, functional text overlays appear for each product, listing the brand name, product description (e.g., 'Kleenex 3-layer facial tissue'), 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', and 'Special Price'. (3) Tone is informative and promotional, highlighting savings with large, colorful fonts.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid succession of product showcases with pricing -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: A few shoppers are visible in the background aisles; hands holding or pointing to products.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Different sections of a Costco warehouse, including dry goods aisles, refrigerated sections, and product displays.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a quick and efficient overview of weekly discounted products at Costco Taiwan to encourage viewers to visit the store and take advantage of the sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information, focus on specific brands and discounts available at a specific retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed Mandarin narration with synchronized price graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical of 'deal hunter' or shopping guide content found on social media platforms like TikTok or Reels, optimized for short attention spans.
